nasb.text: Jesus, knowing that the Father had given all things into His hands, and that He had come forth from God and was going back to God,

esv.text: Jesus, knowing that the Father had given all things into his hands, and that he had come from God and was going back to God,

cnv.text: 耶穌知道父已經把萬有交在他手中，並且知道自己從　神而來，又要回到　神那裡去，

ccb.text: 耶稣知道父将一切交给了祂，也知道自己从上帝那里来、要回到上帝那里，

csbs.text: 耶稣知道父把一切交在自己手里，并且知道自己是从神那里来，又要回到神那里去。
